title: Derive L1/L2 operator origin for differential closure
description: The differential compatibility family requires non-decorative operators L1[A_spatial] and L2[A] with a coefficient ratio alpha1:alpha2:alpha3 that is derived before gamma recovery checks. The minimal elliptic form (Laplacian L1, Laplacian L2) is a structural candidate but its coefficient ratio remains free. L2[A] is a GR-smuggling danger junction if it encodes B=1/A or Schwarzschild expansion.
